creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
My problem is not 100% related to this problem, but it is very similar and maybe this is a good place for it.

I followed you installation manual here:
https://github.com/t-zuehlsdorff/gitlabhq/blob/master/doc/install/installation-freebsd.md

But I have the problem that the key I add over the web gui is not added to /home/git/.ssh/authorized_keys.
The directory of the git user was changed to /home/git.
